# YYYY-Www Weekly Review

> Summarize the overall state of this week in one sentence.

## Last Week's Plan vs. Reality

Write the execution result of last week's `## Next Week's Plan`: completed, partially completed, or not completed, with reasons.

## What Happened This Week

Write the most important progress and key actions from this week.

## Moments Worth Remembering

Write the records, conversations, or ideas most worth keeping from this week.

## What I Learned

Write the most important insights and transferable lessons from this week.

## What Went Well / What Can Improve

Write what went well and what can be improved next week.

## Next Week's Plan

Write next week's plan. First propose a framework, confirm it with the user, then write the final version. Align it with the monthly baseline from last month's "Direction / Plan for Next Month".
